info.title: ScoreCard AI API
info.description: Provides an API for logging testcases and running testsets against a model.

get.description: Root endpoint that returns a welcome message.

x-codeSamples.source:
from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
v1 = client.v1.retrieve()
print(v1)

get.description: Retrieve Testset metadata without Testcase data

x-codeSamples.source:
from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
testset = client.v1.testset.retrieve(
    0,
)
print(testset.id)

from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
testset = client.v1.testset.delete(
    0,
)
print(testset.id)

from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
testset = client.v1.testset.create(
    name="string",
)
print(testset.id)

get.description: Read the schema of a Testset

x-codeSamples.source:
from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
schema = client.v1.testset.schema.retrieve(
    0,
)
print(schema.variables)

get.description: Retrieve all Testcases from a Testset

x-codeSamples.source:
from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
testcase = client.v1.testset.testcase.list(
    0,
)
print(testcase.count)

from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
testcase = client.v1.testset.testcase.create(
    0,
    user_query="string",
)
print(testcase.testset_id)

from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
testcase = client.v1.testset.testcase.retrieve(
    0,
    testset_id=0,
)
print(testcase.testset_id)

from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
testcase = client.v1.testset.testcase.delete(
    0,
    testset_id=0,
)
print(testcase)

from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
testrecord = client.v1.run.testrecord.retrieve(
    0,
    run_id=0,
)
print(testrecord.id)

from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
testrecord = client.v1.run.testrecord.create(
    0,
)
print(testrecord.id)

schema.title: Run Params
schema.description: The parameters to create a new run.

x-codeSamples.source:
from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
run = client.v1.run.create()
print(run.id)

parameters.name: run_id

schema.description: The id of the run to retrieve.
schema.title: Run Id

parameters.description: The id of the run to retrieve.

x-codeSamples.source:
from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
run = client.v1.run.retrieve(
    310,
)
print(run.id)

patch.description: Update the status of a run.

parameters.name: run_id

schema.description: The id of the run to update.
schema.title: Run Id

parameters.description: The id of the run to update.

x-codeSamples.source:
from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
status = client.v1.run.status.update(
    310,
    status="pending",
)
print(status.id)

from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
score = client.v1.run.testrecord.score.create(
    0,
    run_id=0,
    binary_score=True,
    int_score=0,
    metric_id=0,
    reasoning="string",
)
print(score.id)

from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
score = client.v1.run.testrecord.score.update(
    0,
    run_id=0,
    testrecord_id=0,
    binary_score=True,
    int_score=0,
    reasoning="string",
)
print(score.id)

get.description: Retrieve metrics associated with a run

parameters.name: run_id

schema.description: The id of the run to retrieve.
schema.title: Run Id

parameters.description: The id of the run to retrieve.

schema.title: Response Read Run Metrics V1 Run Metric  Run Id  Get

x-codeSamples.source:
from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
run_metric = client.v1.run_metric.retrieve(
    310,
)
print(run_metric)

schema.title: Response Get Traces V1 Traces Get

parameters.name: trace_id

schema.description: The ID of the trace to retrieve spans from.
schema.title: Trace Id

parameters.description: The ID of the trace to retrieve spans from.

trace_id.summary: The ID of the trace to retrieve spans from.

schema.title: Response Get Trace Spans V1 Traces  Trace Id  Spans Get
Prompt Params
schema.description: The parameters to create a new prompt.

example_root.summary: Example PromptCreateParams for creating a new root prompt

example_child.summary: Example PromptCreateParams for creating a child of an existing prompt

x-codeSamples.source:
from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
prompt = client.v1.prompt.create(
    prompt_template="You are a virtual assistant",
)
print(prompt.id)

get.description: Retrieve active root prompts for the org

schema.title: Response Get Root Prompts V1 Prompt Roots Get

x-codeSamples.source:
from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
prompt = client.v1.prompts.list()
print(prompt)

parameters.name: id

schema.description: The id of the prompt to get.
schema.title: Id

parameters.description: The id of the prompt to get.

x-codeSamples.source:
from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
prompt = client.v1.prompts.retrieve(
    "string",
)
print(prompt.id)

parameters.name: id

schema.description: The id of the prompt to update.
schema.title: Id

parameters.description: The id of the prompt to update.

schema.description: The parameters to update a prompt.
schema.title: Update Params

example_update.summary: Example PromptUpdateParams for modifying the name and archive status of a prompt.

x-codeSamples.source:
from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
prompt = client.v1.prompts.update(
    "string",
)
print(prompt.id)

get.description: Retrieve a prod prompt by name

example_get.summary: For reading a production prompt by name.

x-codeSamples.source:
from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
prompt = client.v1.prompts.retrieve_by_name(
    "string",
)
print(prompt.id)

get.description: Retrieve all nodes within the same graph as the prompt, sorted by created_at desc

schema.title: Response Get Prompt Graph V1 Prompt  Id  Graph Get

x-codeSamples.source:
from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
graph = client.v1.prompts.graph.list(
    "string",
)
print(graph)

get.description: Root endpoint that returns a welcome message.

x-codeSamples.source:
from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
top_level = client.top_level.welcome_message()
print(top_level)

from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
run = client.runs.create(
    scoring_config_id=0,
    testset_id=0,
)
print(run)

from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
testset = client.testsets.retrieve(
    0,
)
print(testset)

from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
testset = client.testsets.create(
    name="string",
    using_retrieval=True,
)
print(testset)

post.description: Add a new test case to an existing test set.

x-codeSamples.source:
from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
testcase = client.testcases.create(
    context="string",
    ideal="string",
    response="string",
    testset_id=0,
    user_query="string",
)
print(testcase)

from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
testrecord = client.testrecord.create(
    model_response="string",
    run_id=0,
    testcase_id=0,
)
print(testrecord)

patch.description: Update the status of a run.

x-codeSamples.source:
from scorecard import Scorecard

client = Scorecard()
run = client.runs.update(
    0,
    status="string",
)
print(run)
